scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.doctor: node -e "const major=Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if(major<20){console.error('Node 20+ is required. Current: '+process.version); process.exit(1);} console.log('Node:', process.version);" && npm config get registry
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/shared && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/core && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/agent-perfume && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/agent-wardrobe && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/api && npm run build --workspace @agent-foundry/workbench
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @agent-foundry/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @agent-foundry/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @agent-foundry/agent-perfume && npm run typecheck --workspace @agent-foundry/agent-wardrobe && npm run typecheck --workspace @agent-foundry/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @agent-foundry/workbench
